query: Microsoft annual revenue fiscal 2025 annual report revenue 2025
answer: Microsoft's annual revenue for fiscal 2025 was $305.453 billion, up 16.67% year-over-year. The company's revenue for 2024 was $281.724 billion, a 14.93% increase from 2023. Microsoft's revenue for 2023 was $245.122 billion.

results.title: FY25 Q4 - More Personal Computing Performance - Investor Relations
results.snippet: Fiscal Year 2025 Compared with Fiscal Year 2024. Revenue increased $3.8 billion or 7%. • Windows and Devices revenue increased $288 million or 2%. Windows

All information speaks as of the last fiscal quarter or year for which we have filed a Form 10-K or 10-Q, or for historical information the date or period expressly indicated in or with such information. Information contained in these documents is current as of the earnings date, and not restated for new accounting standards. #### Related Information.
